text_block_list.text:
I notice a lot of people gathering around the
track as I'm walking by.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pipe down. The race is about to start.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...The president sent me out here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We're holding a public relations event to teach
people who've never seen a race what it's all
about.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I don't see why I have to host it, though...

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're gonna run too, right?! I'll be cheering
for you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Not necessary. Just shut up and watch.

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text: Oh... I-I see... Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
Wow... That's so rude. I can't believe a bully like
you is running!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
I thought racers found their fans' support
motivating. You should be grateful to even have
any fans with that attitude.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Let 'em chirp all they want.

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I'm trying to talk to you and you call it chirping?! That's it, I'm going ho—Agh!
Thud.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: Leave me alone! It's just a light sprain—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Shush. Turn your shoulder this way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's no swelling, so I just taped it up. ...Does it
hurt?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: No. ...You're really good at that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm very careful when it comes to injuries. I don't
want to miss any races.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Plus...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If there are people out there who would support
someone like me, then I wouldn't want to worry
them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...All I want is for them to watch my back as I blow
by.

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
...!
S-so... coool!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...What are you gawking at?! Go to the hospital
already!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Unless you want this "bully" to carry you there?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
Ah! N-no, that's okay! I don't think my heart could
take it!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
Um, thank you for everything! I'll be sure to make
a full recovery and come cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Cheer me on? ...Didn't she hate my guts a second
ago?
choice_data_list: Maybe she realized how cool you were.
You must've impressed her with your work!
You must've impressed her with your work!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Cheer me on? ...Didn't she hate my guts a second
ago?
choice_data_list: Maybe she realized how cool you were.
You must've impressed her with your work!
You must've impressed her with your work!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Cool? ...Now I'm even more lost. They're scared of
me, yet they admire me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Is it like some kind of... infatuation or
something like that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hey. Wipe that smile off your face.

Even with Narita Brian staring me down, I can't
help but chuckle.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You think so? ...I'm not sure I really fulfilled my
duty as the host.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, you've been splendid.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I can only hope you'll keep up the good work.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What the... What the heck...

After that, Narita Brian continues to gain fans
without quite knowing why.
